Top 100 Highest-Paid Work Orders click a tech name to see their full profile
Peak Day
Tuesdays · 4,167
28% of all WOs. Mon-Wed combined: 79%. Weekend volume is essentially zero (240 Fri/Sat/Sun combined).
Dominant Service Time
4:00 PM EDT
3,905 WOs scheduled (26%). Combined with 4:30 PM EDT, late afternoon = half of all work.
Highest-Risk Role
PNC - SEC · 47.2%
Security role cancels nearly half the time (110/233). PNC - BKR next at 19.4%.
Highest Single WO
$2,061
Network Upgrade Troubleshooting in Brandon, FL · paid. 8 WOs cleared $1,000.
Peak Week
Apr 6 · 1,358 WOs
Project ramped Jan → peaked early April → steady through May → tapered off June onward.
Worst Branch
B786 · 58.3% cancel
Allen Park, MI — 21 of 36 cancelled. P695 Temple Terrace FL next at 50%.
Best Branches
10 perfect · 100%
Ten branches with 25+ WOs each and zero cancellations. J713 Manalapan NJ at 34 WOs.
Pay Distribution
Heavily skewed
8,942 WOs (61%) land in $500-599 — the LVT base rate. Second cluster at $700-799 (1,611 WOs).
Top Tech Earner
Andy Ivor
$46,076 across 90 WOs · 92% paid rate · LVT working 4 states (MD/NJ/NY/PA).
Workhorses
36 techs · 50+ WOs
Together delivered 2,793 WOs (19% of assigned work). Average $24.4K each.
Perfect Records
15 techs · 100% paid
20+ WOs each with zero cancellations — the most reliable corps.
Tech Pool
845 active techs
77% of WOs assigned. Median tech handled 6 WOs / $2,550. Largest single roster span 5 states.
